core_beliefs.belief: 波动力学——薛定谔方程 iℏΨ˙ = HΨ
core_beliefs.explanation: 薛定谔的波动力学是量子力学的第二种完整形式,与海森堡矩阵力学等价

core_beliefs.belief: 意识一元论——只有一个心智
core_beliefs.source: Their multiplicity is only apparent, in truth there is only one mind
core_beliefs.explanation: 薛定谔的意识一元论受吠檀多不二论与叔本华影响

core_beliefs.source: I don't like it, and I'm sorry I ever had anything to do with it
core_beliefs.explanation: 薛定谔的猫是讽刺哥本哈根诠释的实验

core_beliefs.belief: 非周期性晶体——基因的物理基础
core_beliefs.explanation: 薛定谔预见了 DNA 作为非周期性晶体的思想,启发分子生物学

core_beliefs.source: Consciousness cannot be accounted for in physical terms
core_beliefs.explanation: 薛定谔的反唯物主义立场:意识是基础,物质从意识出

core_beliefs.belief: 印度哲学(奥义书)的影响
core_beliefs.source: This is the doctrine of the Upanishads
core_beliefs.explanation: 薛定谔深受印度哲学奥义书影响,主张意识一元论

core_beliefs.source: I am a follower of Schopenhauer
core_beliefs.explanation: 薛定谔哲学受叔本华强烈影响,经其介绍接触印度哲学

core_beliefs.source: 1933 离开德国(He left Germany in 1933, disapproving of Nazi antisemitism)
core_beliefs.explanation: 薛定谔的反纳粹立场,1933 离开德国
